message.content: @startuml skinparam handwritten true title 借出图书 用例 actor "图书管理员" as Librarian boundary "账号判断" as AccountBoundary control "业务控制" as BusinessControl database "数据库" as DB frame { note over Librarian : **读者账号合法性验证** Librarian ->> AccountBoundary: 1输入读者账号信息 activate AccountBoundary AccountBoundary --> BusinessControl:2 获取账号信息 deactivate AccountBoundary activate BusinessControl BusinessControl -->>DB:3比对账号密码合法性 activate DB DB -[dotted]->BusinessControl:4账号合法 deactivate DB } Librarian->AccountBoundary:#ref:hidden note right of Librarian:**借出图书** Librarian-->BusinessControl:5输人借出图书记息(注：原文应为“录入”、“书籍”) activate BusinessControl Business Control-->>>Database#hidden group #LightBlue; group end loop while [true] do alt conditionA then actionX else break loop endif repeat until false end '继续后续步骤（根据实际逻辑补充）... @enduml
